Primary.$description: Page canvas - the default app surface. → White/1000

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover on the page canvas (rows, list items). → Grey/100 · ≈ Alabaster

Secondary.$description: First raised surface - cards and panels. → Grey/100 · ≈ Alabaster

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the card surface. → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Tertiary.$description: Second surface level - wells, table stripes, insets. → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the inset surface. → Grey/300 · ≈ Silver

Primary.$description: Solid neutral fill - secondary buttons, chips, toggle-off. → Grey/700 · = Outer Space

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the solid neutral fill. → Grey/800 · ≈ Black

Secondary.$description: Light neutral fill - subtle chips, pills, table headers. → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the light neutral fill. → Grey/300 · ≈ Silver

Tertiary.$description: Faintest neutral fill - quiet backgrounds. → Grey/100 · ≈ Alabaster

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint neutral fill. → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Primary.$description: Violet brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Violet/500 · Main

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the violet brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Violet/600 · ≈ Daisy Bush

Secondary.$description: Violet tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Violet/200 · ≈ Melrose Mid

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the violet tint. → Violet/300 · ≈ Melrose

Tertiary.$description: Faintest violet tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Violet/100 · = Magnolia

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint violet tint. → Violet/200 · ≈ Melrose Mid

Primary.$description: Magenta brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Magenta/500 · Main

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the magenta brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Magenta/400

Secondary.$description: Magenta tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Magenta/200

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the magenta tint. → Magenta/300 · = Heliotrope Mid

Tertiary.$description: Faintest magenta tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Magenta/100 · = Heliotrope Light

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint magenta tint. → Magenta/200

Primary.$description: Coral brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Coral/500 · Main

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the coral brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Coral/400 · ≈ Persimmon Mid

Secondary.$description: Coral tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Coral/200 · ≈ Persimmon Light

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the coral tint. → Coral/300 · ≈ Persimmon Mid

Tertiary.$description: Faintest coral tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Coral/100 · = Chablis

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint coral tint. → Coral/200 · ≈ Persimmon Light

Primary.$description: Green brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Green/500 · Main

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the green brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Green/400

Secondary.$description: Green tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Green/200

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the green tint. → Green/300

Tertiary.$description: Faintest green tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Green/100 · = White Ice

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint green tint. → Green/200

Primary.$description: Orange brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Orange/500 · Main

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the orange brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Orange/400 · ≈ Orange Mid

Secondary.$description: Orange tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Orange/200 · ≈ Orange Light

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the orange tint. → Orange/300 · ≈ Orange Mid

Tertiary.$description: Faintest orange tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Orange/100 · = Orange Light

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint orange tint. → Orange/200 · ≈ Orange Light

Primary.$description: Blue brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Blue/500 · Main (gen true-blue)

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the blue brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Blue/600

Secondary.$description: Blue tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Blue/200

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the blue tint. → Blue/300

Tertiary.$description: Faintest blue tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Blue/100 · ≈ Patterns Blue

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint blue tint. → Blue/200

Bold.$description: Solid success fill - positive results, confirmations. Banners, badges, toasts. → Green/500 · Main

Light.$description: Success tint - soft banners, row highlights. → Green/100 · = White Ice

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold success fills — follows the hover law. → Green/400

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light success tints (one step darker). → Green/200

Bold.$description: Solid warning fill - caution, attention needed. Banners, badges, toasts. → Orange/500 · Main

Light.$description: Warning tint - soft banners, row highlights. → Orange/100 · = Orange Light

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold warning fills — follows the hover law. → Orange/400 · ≈ Orange Mid

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light warning tints (one step darker). → Orange/200 · ≈ Orange Light

Bold.$description: Solid danger fill - errors, destructive actions. Banners, badges, toasts. → Coral/500 · Main

Light.$description: Danger tint - soft banners, row highlights. → Coral/100 · = Chablis

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold danger fills — follows the hover law. → Coral/400 · ≈ Persimmon Mid

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light danger tints (one step darker). → Coral/200 · ≈ Persimmon Light

Primary.$description: Fill for disabled controls. → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Bold.$description: Solid info fill - neutral information. Banners, badges, toasts. → Blue/500 · Main (gen true-blue)

Light.$description: Info tint - soft banners, row highlights. → Blue/100 · ≈ Patterns Blue

Bold-Hover.$description: Hover for bold info fills — follows the hover law. → Blue/600

Light-Hover.$description: Hover for light info tints (one step darker). → Blue/200

Inverse.$description: Light overlay on dark imagery/video; inverse of Overlay/Default. → White/300

Default.$description: Blocking layer under modals; also darkens photos for text (black 70%). → Black/500
Frosted translucent surface (bars, menus over scroll) - pair with Blur/400 background blur. → White/700

Inverse.$description: Dark glass plate over media - player controls, badges on imagery; pair with Blur/* when frosted. → Black/400

Default.$description: Selected item background - active menu row, chosen date, highlighted table row. → Violet/100 · = Magnolia

Primary.$description: Yellow brand fill - primary actions and strong emphasis. → Yellow/500 · Main

Primary-Hover.$description: Hover of the yellow brand fill (one step away from its text colour). → Yellow/400

Secondary.$description: Yellow tint - selected states, secondary emphasis. → Yellow/200

Secondary-Hover.$description: Hover of the yellow tint. → Yellow/300

Tertiary.$description: Faintest yellow tint - soft backgrounds, highlights. → Yellow/100 · ≈ Gin Fizz

Tertiary-Hover.$description: Hover of the faint yellow tint. → Yellow/200

Primary.$description: Main text on light surfaces. → Grey/900 · = Near-black

Secondary.$description: Muted text - captions, meta, labels. → Grey/700 · = Outer Space

Tertiary.$description: Faintest text - hints, placeholders. → Grey/600 · ≈ Jumbo

Primary.$description: Text on solid neutral fills (white). → White/1000
Violet accent text on light surfaces. → Violet/700 · ≈ Daisy Bush

On-Primary.$description: White — violet/500 is dark enough for white (AA). Light-main hues use hue/900. → White/1000

On-Secondary.$description: Text on the violet tint (Secondary). → Violet/900 · = Persian Indigo Dark

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint violet tint. → Violet/900 · = Persian Indigo Dark

Primary.$description: Magenta accent text on light surfaces. → Magenta/700 · ≈ Heliotrope Dark

On-Primary.$description: magenta/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white. → Magenta/900

On-Secondary.$description: Text on the magenta tint (Secondary). → Magenta/900

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint magenta tint. → Magenta/900

Primary.$description: Coral accent text on light surfaces. → Coral/700

On-Primary.$description: coral/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white. → Coral/900

On-Secondary.$description: Text on the coral tint (Secondary). → Coral/900

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint coral tint. → Coral/900

Primary.$description: Bright accent (/700) — 3:1 large text only, not small body. → Green/700 · ≈ Snake

On-Primary.$description: green/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white. → Green/900

On-Secondary.$description: Text on the green tint (Secondary). → Green/900

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint green tint. → Green/900

Primary.$description: Orange accent text on light surfaces. → Orange/700 · ≈ Orange Dark

On-Primary.$description: orange/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white. → Orange/900

On-Secondary.$description: Text on the orange tint (Secondary). → Orange/900

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint orange tint. → Orange/900

Primary.$description: Blue accent text on light surfaces. → Blue/700

On-Primary.$description: White — blue/500 is dark enough for white (AA). Light-main hues use hue/900. → White/1000

On-Secondary.$description: Text on the blue tint (Secondary). → Blue/900

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint blue tint. → Blue/900

On-Bold.$description: Hue/900 - this status bold is light, white would fail contrast (white-text-hues rule). → Green/900

On-Light.$description: Success text on its Light tint. → Green/800

On-Bold.$description: Hue/900 - this status bold is light, white would fail contrast (white-text-hues rule). → Orange/900

On-Light.$description: Warning text on its Light tint. → Orange/700 · ≈ Orange Dark

On-Bold.$description: Hue/900 - this status bold is light, white would fail contrast (white-text-hues rule). → Coral/900

On-Light.$description: Danger text on its Light tint. → Coral/700

Primary.$description: Disabled text — WCAG exempts inactive components from contrast minimums. → Grey/400

On-Bold.$description: White - info bold (blue) is dark enough for white. Same white-text rule as brand colours. → White/1000

On-Light.$description: Info text on its Light tint. → Blue/700

Visited.$description: Visited hyperlink colour. → Magenta/700 · ≈ Heliotrope Dark

Primary.$description: Bright accent (/700) — 3:1 large text only, not small body. → Yellow/700

On-Primary.$description: yellow/900 — the main /500 is light, white would fail contrast. Violet/blue use white. → Yellow/900

On-Secondary.$description: Text on the yellow tint (Secondary). → Yellow/900

On-Tertiary.$description: Text on the faint yellow tint. → Yellow/900

On-Overlay.$description: Text/icon on overlay & scrim surfaces. → White/1000

Primary.$description: Quiet hairline - dividers, quiet cards. Decorative (exempt from 3:1). → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Secondary.$description: Functional border - inputs, selects. Meets 3:1 on light surfaces. Hover state: step up to Tertiary. → Grey/500 · ≈ Jumbo

Tertiary.$description: Strong border - input hover/active, emphasised frames. → Grey/700 · = Outer Space

Default.$description: Keyboard focus ring on light surfaces. → Violet/600 · ≈ Daisy Bush

On-Fill.$description: Focus ring sitting on bright/brand fills. → Grey/900 · = Near-black

Primary.$description: Readable violet border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces. → Violet/700 · ≈ Daisy Bush

Secondary.$description: Decorative violet border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint. → Violet/500 · Main

Tertiary.$description: Soft violet frame - on tinted cards and surfaces. → Violet/300 · ≈ Melrose

Primary.$description: Readable magenta border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces. → Magenta/700 · ≈ Heliotrope Dark

Secondary.$description: Decorative magenta border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint. → Magenta/500 · Main

Tertiary.$description: Soft magenta frame - on tinted cards and surfaces. → Magenta/300 · = Heliotrope Mid

Primary.$description: Readable coral border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces. → Coral/700

Secondary.$description: Decorative coral border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint. → Coral/500 · Main

Tertiary.$description: Soft coral frame - on tinted cards and surfaces. → Coral/300 · ≈ Persimmon Mid

Primary.$description: Readable green border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces. → Green/700 · ≈ Snake

Secondary.$description: Decorative green border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint. → Green/500 · Main

Tertiary.$description: Soft green frame - on tinted cards and surfaces. → Green/300

Primary.$description: Readable orange border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces. → Orange/700 · ≈ Orange Dark

Secondary.$description: Decorative orange border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint. → Orange/500 · Main

Tertiary.$description: Soft orange frame - on tinted cards and surfaces. → Orange/300 · ≈ Orange Mid

Primary.$description: Readable blue border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces. → Blue/700

Secondary.$description: Decorative blue border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint. → Blue/500 · Main (gen true-blue)

Tertiary.$description: Soft blue frame - on tinted cards and surfaces. → Blue/300

Primary.$description: Functional success border - keeps 3:1 on light surfaces. → Green/700 · ≈ Snake

Secondary.$description: Decorative success border (main hue) - pair with a fill. → Green/500 · Main

Tertiary.$description: Soft success frame on its Light tint. → Green/300

Primary.$description: Functional warning border - keeps 3:1 on light surfaces. → Orange/600

Secondary.$description: Decorative warning border (main hue) - pair with a fill. → Orange/500 · Main

Tertiary.$description: Soft warning frame on its Light tint. → Orange/300 · ≈ Orange Mid

Primary.$description: Functional danger border - keeps 3:1 on light surfaces. → Coral/600 · ≈ Persimmon Dark

Secondary.$description: Decorative danger border (main hue) - pair with a fill. → Coral/500 · Main

Tertiary.$description: Soft danger frame on its Light tint. → Coral/300 · ≈ Persimmon Mid

Default.$description: Border of disabled controls. → Grey/200 · ≈ Mischka

Primary.$description: Functional info border - keeps 3:1 on light surfaces. → Blue/600

Secondary.$description: Decorative info border (main hue) - pair with a fill. → Blue/500 · Main (gen true-blue)

Tertiary.$description: Soft info frame on its Light tint. → Blue/300

Default.$description: Border/indicator of the selected item. → Violet/600 · ≈ Daisy Bush

Primary.$description: Readable yellow border - meets 3:1 on light surfaces. → Yellow/700

Secondary.$description: Decorative yellow border (= main /500), exempt from 3:1 - pair with a fill/tint. → Yellow/500 · Main

Tertiary.$description: Soft yellow frame - on tinted cards and surfaces. → Yellow/300

Swatch.$description: Hairline for colour swatches/thumbnails so light fills keep an edge. → Black/300

1.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour. → Violet/500 · Main

2.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour. → Green/500 · Main

3.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour. → Coral/500 · Main

4.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour. → Orange/500 · Main

5.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour. → Blue/500 · Main (gen true-blue)

6.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour. → Magenta/500 · Main

7.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour. → Yellow/500 · Main

8.$description: Categorical chart palette: assign by series order (1..8), never by meaning. Statuses cover semantic colour. → Grey/500 · ≈ Jumbo

Border.$description: Default hairline for inputs, cards, dividers (1px).

Ring.$description: Width of the focus ring itself (CSS outline-width).

Offset.$description: GAP between element edge and focus ring (CSS outline-offset) — spacing, not a stroke. Not applicable inside Figma.

Overlay.$description: Backdrop blur for overlays - pair with Background/Overlay/*.

Scrim.$description: Backdrop blur for scrims behind modals.

Heavy.$description: Heaviest backdrop blur - hero media, Background/Frosted/Inverse.

Disabled.$description: Layer opacity for disabled elements - percent (Figma binds it as 40%); code gets 0.4.

Muted.$description: Layer opacity for de-emphasised elements - percent (60%); code gets 0.6.
